lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹਤ ਨਾਨਕੁ ਸਚੇ ਸਿਉ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਿ ਲਾਏ ਚੂਕੈ ਮਨਿ ਅਭਿਮਾਨਾ ॥
lines.translit: kehat naanak sache siau preet laae chookai man abhimaanaa |
lines.english: Says Nanak, loving the True Lord, the mind's egotism and self-conceit is eradicated.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹਤ ਸੁਣਤ ਸਭੇ ਸੁਖ ਪਾਵਹਿ ਮਾਨਤ ਪਾਹਿ ਨਿਧਾਨਾ ॥੪॥੪॥
lines.translit: kehat sunat sabhe sukh paaveh maanat paeh nidhaanaa |4|4|
lines.english: Those who speak and listen to the Lord's Name, all find peace. Those who believe in it, obtain the supreme treasure. ||4||4||
Bilaaval, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਿ ਜਿਸ ਨੋ ਆਪੇ ਲਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh preet jis no aape laae |
lines.english: The Lord Himself attaches the Gurmukh to His Love;
Meeting with their Beloved, lasting peace is obtained. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਤੁ ਘਰਿ ਬਿਲਾਵਲੁ ਗੁਰ ਸਬਦਿ ਸੁਹਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: tit ghar bilaaval gur sabad suhaae |
lines.english: joyful melodies permeate his home, and he is embellished with the Word of the Guru's Shabad.
The women come and sing the songs of joy.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਜਨ ਕਉ ਮਿਲਿਆ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਈਐ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਵੈ ਸਹਜਿ ਸੁਭਾਏ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: har jan kau miliaa sukh paaeeai har gun gaavai sehaj subhaae |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Meeting with the humble servant of the Lord, peace is obtained, and one intuitively sings the Glorious Praises of the Lord. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉ ਤਿਨ ਬਲਿਹਾਰੈ ਜਿਨੑ ਹਰਿ ਮੰਨਿ ਵਸਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: hau tin balihaarai jina har man vasaae |
lines.english: I am a sacrifice to those, whose minds are filled with the Lord.
They are always imbued with Your Joyful Love;
They obtain eternal glory.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਜੀਉ ਆਪਿ ਵਸੈ ਮਨਿ ਆਏ ॥
lines.translit: har jeeo aap vasai man aae |
lines.english: O Dear Lord, You Yourself come to dwell in their minds.
The Gurmukhs are imbued with the love of the Word of the Shabad.
The Gurmukhs are united in the Lord's Union. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਜ ਘਰਿ ਵਾਸਾ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: nij ghar vaasaa har gun gaae |
lines.english: They abide in the home of their own being, singing the Glorious Praises of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਹੁ ਰੰਗੁ ਕਦੇ ਨ ਉਤਰੈ ਸਾਚਿ ਸਮਾਏ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: eihu rang kade na utarai saach samaae |3|
lines.english: This dye never fades away; they are absorbed in the True Lord. ||3||
They are dyed in the deep crimson color of the Lord's Love; they look so beautiful.
The Shabad deep within the nucleus of the self dispels the darkness of ignorance.
Meeting with my Friend, the True Guru, I have obtained spiritual wisdom.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮੁ ਦ੍ਰਿੜਾਏ ਪੂਰਾ ਗੁਰੁ ਮੇਰਾ ॥੪॥੫॥
lines.translit: naanak naam drirraae pooraa gur meraa |4|5|
lines.english: O Nanak, my Perfect Guru implants the Naam, the Name of the Lord, deep within. ||4||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਸਚਿ ਰਾਤੇ ਤਿਨ ਬਹੁੜਿ ਨ ਫੇਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: jo sach raate tin bahurr na feraa |
lines.english: Those who are attuned to the True Lord, do not have to enter the cycle of reincarnation again.
The Naam, the Name of the Lord, has spontaneously come to abide in my mind.
From the Perfect Guru, I have obtained glorious greatness.
Bilaaval, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਗਦੀਸ ਸੇਵਉ ਮੈ ਅਵਰੁ ਨ ਕਾਜਾ ॥
lines.translit: jagadees sevau mai avar na kaajaa |
lines.english: I serve the Lord of the Universe; I have no other work to do.
Through the Word of the Shabad, I have burnt away egotism and Maya.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਰਿ ਸਾਚੈ ਗੁਰ ਤੇ ਸੋਭਾ ਪਾਈ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: dar saachai gur te sobhaa paaee |1|
lines.english: Through the Guru, I have obtained honor in the Court of the True Lord. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਅਨਦੁ ਹੋਵੈ ਮਨਿ ਮੇਰੈ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਮਾਗਉ ਤੇਰਾ ਨਾਮੁ ਨਿਵਾਜਾ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: anadin anad hovai man merai guramukh maagau teraa naam nivaajaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Night and day, my mind is in ecstasy; as Gurmukh, I beg for the bliss-giving Naam. ||1||Pause||
How rare is that person, who looks upon life and death alike.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਕੀ ਪਰਤੀਤਿ ਮਨ ਤੇ ਪਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: man kee parateet man te paaee |
lines.english: From the mind itself, mental faith is obtained.
Through the Guru, I have realized the Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਘਰ ਹੀ ਮਹਿ ਸਭਿ ਕੋਟ ਨਿਧਾਨ ॥
lines.translit: ghar hee meh sabh kott nidhaan |
lines.english: Within the home of the self are all the millions of treasures.
The True Guru has revealed them, and my egotistical pride is gone.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਹੁੜਿ ਨ ਮਰੈ ਨਾ ਜਮੁ ਪੇਖੈ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: bahurr na marai naa jam pekhai |2|
lines.english: She shall never die again, and shall not have to see the Messenger of Death. ||2||
Night and day, I sing the One Name. ||3||
I keep my meditation always focused on the Cosmic Lord.
I have obtained glorious greatness in this age,
He is forever the Giver of peace; His worth cannot be estimated. ||4||
from the Perfect Guru, meditating on the Naam.
Wherever I look, I see the Lord permeating and pervading.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕਾ ਸਬਦੁ ਅਤਿ ਮੀਠਾ ਲਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: gur kaa sabad at meetthaa laaeaa |
lines.english: The Word of the Guru's Shabad is so very sweet.
By perfect destiny, I have found the Perfect Guru.
He has revealed to me the treasure of the Naam, deep within the nucleus of my self.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਤ੍ਰਿਸਨ ਬੁਝੀ ਮਨਿ ਤਨਿ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਇਆ ॥੫॥੬॥੪॥੬॥੧੦॥
lines.translit: naanak trisan bujhee man tan sukh paaeaa |5|6|4|6|10|
lines.english: O Nanak, my thirst is quenched, and my mind and body have found peace. ||5||6||4||6||10||
Raag Bilaaval, Fourth Mehl, Third House:
One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਉ ਨਟੂਆ ਤੰਤੁ ਵਜਾਏ ਤੰਤੀ ਤਿਉ ਵਾਜਹਿ ਜੰਤ ਜਨਾ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: jiau nattooaa tant vajaae tantee tiau vaajeh jant janaa |1|
lines.english: As the violinist plays upon the strings of the violin, so does the Lord play the living beings. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਉਦਮ ਮਤਿ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਅੰਤਰਜਾਮੀ ਜਿਉ ਪ੍ਰੇਰੇ ਤਿਉ ਕਰਨਾ ॥
lines.translit: audam mat prabh antarajaamee jiau prere tiau karanaa |
lines.english: Effort and intelligence come from God, the Inner-knower, the Searcher of hearts; as He wills, they act.
